items.title: Amazon RDS now supports ENA Express for Multi-AZ replication
items.snippet: Amazon RDS Multi-AZ instances now use ENA Express for replication traffic between Availability Zones. ENA Express uses AWS's Scalable Reliable Datagram (SRD) protocol to optimize network performance by delivering up to 25 Gbps single-flow bandwidth for…

items.title: Why Policy in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore chose Cedar for securing agentic workflows
items.snippet: Agents have agency: they adapt and find multiple ways to solve problems. This autonomy creates a fundamental security challenge: the large language model (LLM) at the heart of the agent is non-deterministic, and its decisions can’t be predicted or guaranteed…
